title: cervaria angustifolia
intro: Cervaria angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved cervaria, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cervariaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cervaria angustifolia include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
